name: White Forest
description:
1-3x Silvy of the White Forest
3x Elzette of the White Forest
1x Astellar of the White Forest
1x Rucia of the White Forest
1-3x Tales of the White Forest
0-1x Elzette, Azamina of the White Forest
**The lines require 1 spell discard. Silvy is the best starter normally but Elzette + spell gets to a level 6 Synchro without a normal and it's free.
**for a no spell discard line, 3x Silvy to search Tales then Elzette does it
